% check a.php
# No errors.

% check b.php
# No errors.

% check c.php
c.php:5:5: class property Box::notExist does not exist
c.php:7:5: class property Box::notExist does not exist

-- defs.php --
<?php

class Box
{
	public string $name;
}
-- a.php --
<?php

$b = new Box;
// @phpstan-ignore property.notFound
$b->notExist;
-- b.php --
<?php

$b = new Box;
$b->notExist; // @phpstan-ignore property.notFound
-- c.php --
<?php

$b = new Box;
// @phpstan-ignore method.notFound
$b->notExist;

$b->notExist;
